question: Which work order lines have a discount greater than 15% and are currently in 'approved' status, ordered by total amount descending?
sql: SELECT id, work_orders_id, production_lines_id, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, discount_pct, tax_amount, line_status, notes FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`mfg_work_orders_lines` WHERE discount_pct > 15 AND line_status = 'approved' ORDER BY total_amount DESC

question: List all approved work orders along with the name of the product they are associated with, showing the reference number, event date, amount, and currency?
sql: SELECT wo.reference_number, wo.event_date, wo.amount, wo.currency, p.name AS product_name, p.code AS product_code FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`mfg_work_orders` wo JOIN `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`inv_products` p ON wo.product_id = p.id WHERE wo.status = 'approved' ORDER BY wo.amount DESC

question: For each production line, what is the total amount, average amount, and number of production runs grouped by status, ordered by total amount descending?
sql: SELECT pl.name AS production_line_name, pr.status, COUNT(pr.id) AS run_count, SUM(pr.amount) AS total_amount, AVG(pr.amount) AS avg_amount FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`mfg_production_runs` pr JOIN `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`mfg_production_lines` pl ON pr.production_lines_id = pl.id GROUP BY pl.name, pr.status HAVING COUNT(pr.id) > 0 ORDER BY total_amount DESC
